name: Elena & Juan School Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: likely Osceola County / Kissimmee area schools (unconfirmed)
recent_news: No news found. Listed website 'Maranataschoolbusservice.com' actually belongs to Maranata School Bus Service Corp in Miami (founded by Ulises Arias, ~50 buses, Miami-Dade/Broward) - this is a data-mapping mismatch, not the same company as Elena & Juan in Kissimmee.
website: unconfirmed (Maranataschoolbusservice.com appears mismatched; no independent web presence found for Elena & Juan)
fit_notes: Kissimmee/Osceola County FL location is in Summit's expansion footprint but the company has no discoverable web/press presence, suggesting it may be a tiny driver-owner operation or defunct. Low confidence; would need direct outreach to Juan Hernandez to qualify.

name: Charlies School Bus
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County schools: American High School, Country Club Middle School, Joella C. Good Elementary, Lawton Chiles Middle School, Spanish Lake Elementary
recent_news: No M&A or material news found. Active operator at 10013 NW 80th Ave, Hialeah; website and Sunbiz filing both current as of 2025-2026.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (25+ yrs) husband-wife owned operator embedded in Miami-Dade with 5 named school routes -- classic Summit tuck-in profile in a state Summit operates in. Small revenue (~$1.3M) means it's pure bolt-on scale, not platform. Succession likely a conversation given founder generation.

name: Schools Transportation
recent_news: No verifiable web presence. 32 Big Bear Ln in Palm Coast is a residential multi-family address built in 2005; listed website 'countytransport.com' did not resolve. Flagler County student transportation is run in-house by Flagler Schools (64 routes, 6,000+ students), with no obvious private contractor of this scale.
fit_notes: Listed 196 employees against $1.3M revenue and a residential HQ -- almost certainly a bad/aggregated data record. Flagler County runs its own buses, so a private operator of this size here is implausible. Recommend deprioritizing or doing field verification before any outreach.

name: E-Z Bus Inc
owner_or_parent: Harp Enterprises Corp (dba EZ Bus Tours & Travel)
districts_or_customers: No district school-bus contracts identified -- charter/field-trip and group travel only
recent_news: Active charter operator; Satisfactory DOT rating, FL Seller of Travel #ST39542, IATAN certified. No M&A activity reported.
fit_notes: Charter/motorcoach + travel agency hybrid rather than a contracted yellow-bus school operator -- weaker strategic fit for Summit's home-to-school platform. Owners are mid-career (founded 1994, active LinkedIn/Instagram), so succession motivation is likely low. Pass unless Summit wants Orlando charter/sports-trip capacity.

name: A & M Transit
owner_or_parent: independent (Youngstown listing distinct from A & M Transit Lines Inc / US Coach Tours in Alliance, OH led by Frank B. Bolog)
recent_news: No news found. Manta lists annual revenue ~$116K and ~3 employees -- materially smaller than the 24 employees / $915K in the source record.
website: uscoachtours.com is the Alliance, OH affiliate (US Coach Tours / Carnation Charter Coach / A & M Transit Lines Inc, founded historically 1903 per BBB, LLC reformed 2015, Frank B. Bolog President) -- not the same Youngstown entity
fit_notes: Youngstown OH is outside Summit's stated states (in_summit_state flag notwithstanding) and the business looks like a sub-$200K charter operator, not a yellow-school-bus contractor. Source record (24 employees, $915K) conflicts with third-party data (3 employees, $116K). Weak fit -- de-prioritize.
